description: Willingness to engage in uncertain or potentially dangerous activities for potential gain
positive_indicators: ["took a chance", "left stability", "bet on myself", "invested savings", "quit job"]
score_1_anchor: Never accepts risk; always chooses the safe option.
score_3_anchor: Moderately risk-tolerant; balances caution and opportunity.
score_4_anchor: Frequently accepts significant risks for potential gain.
score_5_anchor: Embraces high-stakes uncertainty; acts boldly under pressure.

description: Deep awareness of suffering of others coupled with desire to relieve it
score_1_anchor: No observable concern for others' wellbeing.
score_3_anchor: Moderately compassionate; offers help when prompted.
score_5_anchor: Deeply moved by others' suffering; strong drive to help.

description: Quality of being truthful and transparent in communication
score_2_anchor: Occasionally truthful but withholds important information.
score_3_anchor: Generally honest with some selective omissions.
score_5_anchor: Radical honesty even when uncomfortable; no deliberate omissions.

description: Strong desire to explore new experiences and take on challenges
score_3_anchor: Open to novelty when circumstances allow.
score_4_anchor: Actively seeks out new experiences and challenges.
score_5_anchor: Driven by thrill and constant novelty-seeking.

description: Confident and direct communication of needs and opinions
score_1_anchor: Passive; rarely expresses own needs or opinions.
score_2_anchor: Occasionally expresses views when directly asked.
score_3_anchor: Moderately assertive; speaks up in comfortable settings.
score_4_anchor: Consistently direct and confident in communication.
score_5_anchor: Strongly assertive; voices needs even under social pressure.

description: Ability to understand and share feelings of another
positive_indicators: ["understood how they felt", "put myself in their shoes", "validated their feelings"]
score_1_anchor: Unable or unwilling to consider others' emotional states.
score_3_anchor: Can recognise emotions but struggles to fully share them.
score_4_anchor: Strong empathetic responses; genuinely shares others' experiences.
score_5_anchor: Deeply attuned; emotionally resonates with others effortlessly.

description: Ability to understand and apply probabilistic and statistical thinking
score_1_anchor: Makes no use of quantitative reasoning; relies on intuition only.
score_2_anchor: Aware of statistics but misapplies them.
score_5_anchor: Sophisticated statistical reasoning; considers uncertainty rigorously.

description: Emotional exhaustion from caring for others in distress over time
score_1_anchor: No signs of compassion fatigue; fully engaged.
score_2_anchor: Mild emotional fatigue; slightly reduced responsiveness.
score_3_anchor: Moderate fatigue; empathy requires conscious effort.
score_5_anchor: Severe compassion fatigue; complete emotional withdrawal.

description: Ability to face fear, pain or danger without retreating
positive_indicators: ["faced the challenge", "stood up to", "despite the fear", "pressed on"]
score_1_anchor: Avoids all situations involving fear or risk.
score_3_anchor: Moderately courageous; acts despite discomfort when needed.
score_5_anchor: Exceptional courage; acts under extreme fear or danger.

description: Quality of being friendly, generous and considerate
score_1_anchor: No observable kindness; indifferent or hostile.
score_5_anchor: Exceptionally kind; goes out of their way for others.
